items.title: Venezuela Earthquakes
items.why_it_matters: Venezuela is currently experiencing a severe humanitarian crisis following twin earthquakes that have resulted in thousands of deaths and significant displacement in the La Guaira region. International and local efforts are currently focused on search and rescue operations, while reports indicate that recent deportees from the United States have been caught in the destruction. The situation remains fluid, with international organizations bracing for a rising death toll as resources are strained.

items.title: Trump Supreme Court rulings
items.why_it_matters: The Supreme Court delivered a split ruling that affirmed the independence of the Federal Reserve by blocking the firing of Governor Lisa Cook for lack of due process and lack of established cause. While the court explicitly restricted the executive branch's power to remove Fed governors, reporting indicates a broader, concurrent ruling may have simultaneously granted the president wider latitude to remove leaders of other independent agencies. The matter regarding Cook has been remanded to lower courts to adjudicate the validity of the fraud allegations.
